Name: SQL - Update Job
Description: Updates a MS SQL server job with provided ID to be enabled or disabled

Parameters.Name: JobId
Parameters.Label: Job Id
Parameters.HelpText: The SQL server job id which is a `GUID`.

Parameters.Name: JobName
Parameters.Label: Job name
Parameters.HelpText: Optional job name to show on the logs instead of JobId

Parameters.Name: JobStatus
Parameters.Label: Job Status
Parameters.HelpText: Choose `Enable` to enable the job, and `Disabled` to disable the job

Parameters.Name: ConnectionString
Parameters.Label: ConnectionString
Parameters.HelpText: The connection string to connect to the target SQL Server
